text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Phew... (That's enough for now, I need to head back to the academy—)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Did you get separated from your mom?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Sob... Yeah... I can't find my mommy...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't cry. I'll help you look for her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Mother
text_block_list.text:
You mustn't go off by yourself! But... I'm just glad
you're okay.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Mother
text_block_list.text: Thank you so, so much for taking care of her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Don't mention it. Well, take care then.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Child
text_block_list.text: Let's run again sometime, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ah! How is it so late already?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Admire Vega ends up missing training.
